# Hashtagger - AI-Powered Hashtag Generator

## Product Overview
Hashtagger is an AI-powered hashtag generation tool designed for content creators on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X/Twitter. The tool helps users generate optimized hashtags in seconds, with features like banned tag filtering and competition analysis.

## Key Features

### Free Plan
- 10 hashtag generations per day
- Text-to-hashtags conversion
- Multi-platform support (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X/Twitter)
- Automatic banned tag filtering

### Pro Plan ($9/month or $90/year)
- Unlimited hashtag generations
- Image analysis
- Video analysis
- Competition analysis
- Banned tag filtering
- 30-day generation history
- Multi-platform optimization

### Business Plan ($29/month or $290/year)
- Everything in Pro
- CSV bulk generation
- 5 team members
- API access
- Priority support

## How It Works
1. Describe your post or content
2. Select your target platform (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or X/Twitter)
3. Get optimized hashtags in 3 seconds
4. Copy and use the hashtags on your social media posts

## Use Cases
- Instagram influencers looking for trending hashtags
- TikTok creators seeking discoverability
- YouTube content creators optimizing video tags
- X/Twitter users wanting to increase tweet reach
- Social media managers handling multiple accounts

## Technical Information
- Website: https://hashtagger.ai
- Platform: Web-based (no installation required)
- Languages: English, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Thai
- API: Available on Business plan
